mapper.sql: select fund_account_id, account_name, account_type, opening_balance, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from acct_fund_account
mapper.select: where del_flag = '0' order by status asc, fund_account_id asc
mapper.update:
update acct_fund_account set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where fund_account_id in
#{fundAccountId}
